articles.title: Is Kalshi vs Polymarket the next OpenAI vs Anthropic? What to know about the newest big tech rivalry
articles.summary: Two US-based prediction market platforms are squaring off in what could become tech's next major corporate rivalry, with Kalshi and Polymarket competing for dominance in the rapidly growing political betting space. The winner will likely shape how Americans bet on elections and news events for years to come, potentially determining whether prediction markets become mainstream or remain niche.

articles.title: The NFL Doesn’t Want You Trading This. Polymarket Is Doing It Anyway.
articles.summary: The NFL is trying to block certain types of betting markets, but Polymarket is offering them regardless of league objections. This sets up a crucial test of whether traditional sports leagues can control prediction market innovation or if decentralized platforms will simply route around their restrictions.

articles.title: Top US exchange executives call for clearer rules as prediction markets grow
articles.summary: Major US exchange executives are pushing regulators for clearer guidelines as prediction markets gain mainstream traction. The regulatory clarity could unlock institutional money and legitimize betting on everything from elections to economic indicators, potentially creating a massive new asset class.

articles.title: Polymarket Calls In Palantir to Be the Adult in the Room
articles.summary: Polymarket hired Palantir, the data analytics company known for working with governments and intelligence agencies, presumably to handle compliance, risk management, or data oversight as the platform faces regulatory scrutiny. This signals Polymarket is getting serious about institutional-grade operations, which could legitimize prediction markets in the eyes of regulators but might also mean stricter user verification and betting limits.

articles.title: Prediction Market Polymarket Taps Palantir To Monitor Sports Action
articles.summary: Polymarket has partnered with Palantir to use the data analytics giant's monitoring systems for tracking sports betting activity on its platform. The move signals Polymarket's push to legitimize prediction markets by borrowing surveillance tech from traditional finance, potentially attracting institutional players who demand sophisticated risk management.

articles.title: Kalshi Partners With XP to Launch Prediction Markets in Brazil
articles.summary: Kalshi is teaming up with Brazilian fintech XP to bring prediction markets to Latin America's largest economy. Brazil's massive population and growing appetite for financial innovation could create the biggest new prediction market outside the US, especially if regulations stay friendly.

articles.title: Why the Future of Sports Prediction Markets Hangs in the Balance
articles.summary: Sports prediction markets face a critical regulatory crossroads that could determine whether they thrive or get strangled in red tape over the next few years. The outcome will shape whether bettors get access to liquid, efficient markets or remain stuck with traditional sportsbooks that offer worse odds and limited betting options.

articles.title: Inflation outlook: Prediction markets see rising odds of a hotter CPI print
articles.summary: Prediction markets are pricing in higher chances that the next Consumer Price Index report will come in above expectations, signaling traders expect inflation to run hotter than the Fed wants. If CPI does spike, it kills hopes for aggressive rate cuts and sends shockwaves through markets betting on everything from Treasury yields to recession timing.

articles.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Will Announce Its IPO Before This Date? Here's What The Prediction Market Says
articles.summary: SpaceX IPO timing is drawing heavy betting action on prediction markets, with traders wagering on whether Musk will announce the public offering by a specific date. The smart money knows SpaceX's IPO timing affects not just aerospace stocks but Tesla's valuation, given Musk's cross-company leverage games.

articles.title: This 29‑Year‑Old Founder Took On a Federal Regulator to Scale Her Company—and Built an $11 Billion Giant
articles.summary: A 29-year-old founder battled federal regulators to grow her startup into an $11 billion company, proving that regulatory friction doesn't always kill ambitious businesses. Her playbook for navigating compliance while scaling fast offers a template that prediction market platforms desperately need as they face their own regulatory gauntlet.

articles.title: Everything from the last week of everything is gambling now
articles.summary: The gambling industry expanded into yet another corner of daily life this week, with new betting markets launching on everything from weather patterns to celebrity baby names. When literally everything becomes bettable, prediction markets get both more data to work with and more noise to filter through.

articles.title: Kalshi, Polymarket Take on Stock Options With S&P 500 Bets
articles.summary: Kalshi and Polymarket are launching S&P 500 prediction markets that compete directly with traditional stock options trading. This marks a major escalation in prediction markets' battle to capture mainstream financial betting, potentially pulling traders away from expensive options toward simpler binary bets.
